_comment_instructions: This file contains settings for name corrections and AI trigger words. You can edit this file to suite your needs.
_comment_regex_help: Trigger patterns use Regular Expressions (Regex). '\s*' means zero or more spaces. '\.?' means an optional period. For example, 'prompt\s*a\.?i\.?' matches 'promptai', 'prompt a.i.', and 'prompt ai'.
